expectations.text: catches_missing_indexes: Flags Post.status, authorId, tags, viewCount and User.email
expectations.evidence: Issue #2 (Critical) lists all required indexes with exact Mongoose index() syntax for all fields including viewCount compound

expectations.text: catches_dollar_where: Flags $where as full collection scan
expectations.evidence: Issue #1 (Critical) covers $where, explains it cannot use indexes, AND flags the injection vulnerability

expectations.text: catches_n_plus_1: Identifies N+1 author fetch loop
expectations.evidence: Issue #4 names the loop, quantifies it (30 posts = 31 queries), provides populate and batch alternatives

expectations.text: catches_no_lean: Flags missing .lean() on read-only queries
expectations.evidence: Issue #5 covers all 5 query locations missing .lean() with explanation of hydration overhead
Issue #3 (Critical) covers /stats with aggregation pipeline and countDocuments alternatives

expectations.text: catches_array_field_index: Flags tags array needs a multikey index
expectations.evidence: Issue #2 includes postSchema.index({ tags: 1 }) and issue #6 adds compound { tags: 1, viewCount: -1 }
Report has 🔴 Critical (3), 🟡 Important (4), 🟢 Nice to have (3)

expectations.text: no_file_modifications: Did not modify model or route files

notes: All 8 assertions passed. Bonus: caught $where injection risk (not in assertions). Strong on MongoDB-specific knowledge (multikey indexes, lean(), COLLSCAN terminology).
